'''hasate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoographically|zoographically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-s-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoographically|zoographically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hasate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:hasate|hasate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hasatesher|hasatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hasatesherĂ«m|hasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hasatero|hasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hasateshĂ«|hasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hasateshĂ«m|hasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihasatero|gokihasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihasateshĂ«|gokihasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihasateshĂ«m|gokihasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohasankerom|gohasankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohasankeshĂ«|gohasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohasankeshĂ«m|gohasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohasankeya|gohasankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hasaterom|hasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hasatemu|hasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hasateya|hasateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihasaterom|gokihasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihasatemu|gokihasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihasateya|gokihasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:hasasate|hasasate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hasasatesher|hasasatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hasasatesherĂ«m|hasasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hasasatero|hasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hasasateshĂ«|hasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hasasateshĂ«m|hasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihasasatero|gokihasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihasasateshĂ«|gokihasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihasasateshĂ«m|gokihasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohasasankerom|gohasasankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohasasankeshĂ«|gohasasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohasasankeshĂ«m|gohasasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohasasankeya|gohasasankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hasasaterom|hasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hasasatemu|hasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hasasateya|hasasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihasasaterom|gokihasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihasasatemu|gokihasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihasasateya|gokihasasateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:hĂŠsĂŠte|hĂŠsĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hĂŠsĂŠtesher|hĂŠsĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m|hĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠsĂŠtero|hĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|hĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|hĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠsĂŠtero|gokihĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|gokihĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|gokihĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohĂŠsĂŠnkerom|gohĂŠsĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«|gohĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gohĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohĂŠsĂŠnkeya|gohĂŠsĂŠnkeya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠsĂŠtemu|hĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hĂŠsĂŠteya|hĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠsĂŠterom|gokihĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠsĂŠtemu|gokihĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihĂŠsĂŠteya|gokihĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:hafsafte|hafsafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hafsaftesher|hafsaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafsaftesherĂ«m|hafsaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafsaftero|hafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hafsafteshĂ«|hafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafsafteshĂ«m|hafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafsaftero|gokihafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihafsafteshĂ«|gokihafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafsafteshĂ«m|gokihafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohafsafnkerom|gohafsafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohafsafnkeshĂ«|gohafsafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohafsafnkeshĂ«m|gohafsafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohafsafnkeya|gohafsafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafsafterom|hafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafsaftemu|hafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hafsafteya|hafsafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafsafterom|gokihafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafsaftemu|gokihafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihafsafteya|gokihafsafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
